mar-01-golden-hour: slow cinematic dolly forward toward horizon, waves crashing and rolling forward continuously, white foam spreading across wet sand, golden light rays changing slowly through clouds, water reflecting moving sky
mar-02-aerial-bazaruto: slow steady drone flyover moving forward, camera tilting slightly downward, ocean currents visible flowing beneath, cloud shadows moving across turquoise water, parallax effect on coral reef below
mar-03-wave-rocks: dramatic waves surging and crashing against rocks, spray exploding upward catching golden light, water rushing between boulders then pulling back, continuous powerful ocean motion, camera slightly shaking from impact
mar-04-moonlit: gentle camera drift to the right, moonlight path glowing softly and moving gently on water surface, bioluminescent waves gently breaking on shore, stars visible in sky, very slow peaceful movement
mar-05-onda-suave: extreme slow motion wave curling forward, crystal clear water rolling over sand, thousands of tiny bubbles forming and bursting, foam patterns spreading in intricate detail, mesmerizing repetitive motion
mar-06-horizonte-vasto: very slow cinematic pan from left to right across vast ocean, distant boat gently rocking, large ocean swells rising and falling, massive clouds slowly building on horizon, epic scale movement
mar-07-mare-baixa: gentle camera push-in toward tidal pool, tiny fish darting between rocks, small waves lapping at pool edges, reflections rippling, hermit crab moving across rocks, miniature world coming alive
mar-08-tempestade-mar: massive storm waves building and crashing violently, wall of white water surging forward, spray flying horizontally in strong wind, dark churning clouds racing overhead, raw dramatic power
mar-09-amanhecer-rosa: slow crane shot rising upward, pink light gradually intensifying across sky and water, fishing boats gently swaying, calm water surface catching growing warm light, sunrise time-lapse feel
mar-10-underwater-surface: fish swimming lazily through frame, underwater light patterns moving gently and changing slowly on coral, gentle current swaying sea plants, camera slowly rotating, bubbles rising to surface, two worlds moving differently
mar-11-espuma-areia: extreme close-up of foam bubbles popping one by one, water slowly retreating revealing wet sand patterns, new wave gently arriving and spreading fresh foam, hypnotic rhythmic cycle
mar-12-oceano-profundo: slow steady drone descent toward ocean surface, vast swells rolling across frame, single light patch from sun moving across water as clouds drift, vertigo-inducing scale, deep blue tones gradually deepening
mar-13-recife-coral: colorful fish school swimming through coral in formation, sunlight beams moving gently through water, sea fan swaying in current, camera gliding forward through underwater garden, vibrant living motion
mar-14-ondas-lentas: silky smooth water flowing around dark rocks like liquid glass, long exposure motion blur effect, camera slowly pushing forward, ethereal mist forming and dissolving, dreamlike continuous flow
mar-15-crepusculo-oceano: last golden light slowly fading from horizon, sky colors deepening from amber to deep blue, calm water surface darkening gradually, single star appearing and brightening, day surrendering to night in real time
praia-01-tofo-sunrise: golden sunrise light sweeping across beach from right to left, palm fronds swaying in morning breeze, gentle waves washing up sand and retreating, footprints filling with water, warm light intensifying
praia-02-deserted-dawn: morning mist slowly lifting and dissolving, gentle waves lapping rhythmically on sand, fishing boats rocking gently, light gradually brightening and warming the scene, peaceful awakening
praia-03-coqueiros: palm trees swaying gracefully in tropical breeze, shadows moving gently across white sand, hammock rocking gently, camera slowly tracking along beach, paradise in gentle constant motion
praia-04-mare-pools: slow cinematic drone flyover of vast tidal flats, cloud reflections moving in shallow pools, distant figure walking creating ripples, epic sense of space and solitude, steady forward camera movement
praia-05-conchas: gentle wave foam reaching toward shells then retreating, camera slowly pushing in on details, water droplets catching sunlight, sand grains moving with gentle water flow, intimate natural rhythm
praia-06-dhow: traditional sail fabric billowing and flapping in wind, boat rocking gently on waves, sunset light changing slowly on weathered wood, fishing nets swaying, camera slowly circling the vessel
praia-07-ondas-douradas: golden waves continuously lapping forward onto beach, wet sand reflecting warm sunset colors, camera tracking along shoreline, palm tree shadows lengthening in real time, warm golden flow
praia-08-areia-branca: slow steady drone flying forward over pristine coastline, turquoise waves breaking in white lines below, sand patterns visible from above, cloud shadows racing across beach, cinematic aerial journey
praia-09-nevoeiro-costa: thick fog rolling slowly onto beach like a living thing, visibility changing moment to moment, ghostly shapes emerging and disappearing, mysterious ethereal movement, camera drifting through mist
praia-10-rochas-mar: powerful waves surging between dark rocks creating cascading waterfalls, white water rushing through channels, spray rising and falling, camera positioned low capturing dramatic force
praia-11-pegadas-agua: waves rhythmically washing forward and erasing footprints in sand, water advancing and retreating in continuous cycle, each wave reaching slightly further, meditative repetitive motion
praia-12-mangal-praia: dappled light changing slowly through mangrove canopy as branches sway, water gently flowing between roots, small fish visible darting, camera slowly moving through tunnel of roots
praia-13-lua-praia: moonlight path glowing softly and moving gently on calm water, gentle night waves breaking softly, palm fronds swaying in warm night breeze, camera slowly drifting forward toward moon
praia-14-crepusculo-violeta: sky colors deepening dramatically from warm gold to deep violet, calm water surface becoming a perfect mirror, colors changing slowly in real time, camera slowly tilting upward toward sky
praia-15-amanhecer-pescadores: fishing boats launching into gentle surf, bow cutting through small waves, golden morning light warming the scene, camera following boats from shore, sails unfurling in breeze
praia-16-wimby: crystal clear shallow water gently lapping on white sand, palm fronds swaying in tropical breeze, camera slowly drifting along pristine shoreline, light moving gently on turquoise water
praia-17-pemba-baia: slow cinematic pan across vast bay, dhow boats gently rocking, red cliffs catching warm light, camera elevated above bay revealing immense scale
praia-18-ilha-mocambique: gentle waves washing against ancient coral stone walls, dhow sailing slowly past fortress, warm light on weathered colonial architecture, camera tracking along coastline
praia-19-quirimbas-norte: slow aerial drift over pristine white sandbank, turquoise lagoon water rippling gently, coral reef patterns visible below surface, untouched paradise revealing itself

rio-02-waterfall: water cascading powerfully over mossy rocks, spray and mist billowing upward, rainbow forming and changing slowly in spray, camera slowly approaching falls, thundering continuous flow
rio-03-lake-golden: perfect mirror reflections rippling as birds fly low over water, large flock taking flight from surface, clouds reflected and moving in unison, camera slowly panning across vast landscape
rio-04-nascente: crystal clear spring water bubbling energetically from rocks, fresh water flowing over colorful pebbles, sunbeams moving gently through canopy above, camera pushing in on source, life emerging
rio-05-delta: slow aerial movement following river branches splitting and rejoining, different colored waters merging in swirling patterns, camera flying forward over organic delta patterns, mesmerizing flow
rio-06-reflexo: single leaf landing on perfect mirror water, circular ripple expanding outward disturbing reflection, reflection slowly reforming, camera very slowly pushing in, meditative single moment
rio-07-corrente: powerful white water rushing between boulders, spray rising, rocks visible through clear rushing water, vegetation on banks swaying from river wind, camera tracking alongside rapids
rio-08-meandro: slow cinematic drone following river curves from above, water flowing gently through green floodplain, cattle grazing on banks, camera sweeping along meandering path, epic aerial journey
rio-09-nenufa: water lilies gently bobbing on still water, dragonfly landing on flower, tiny ripples expanding from each lily pad, morning mist slowly dissolving, camera drifting among flowers
rio-10-ponte-velha: gentle river current flowing under old bridge, leaves and twigs drifting past, light changing slowly through gaps in wooden planks, camera slowly crossing from one bank to other
rio-11-amanhecer-rio: golden mist rising dramatically from warm river into cool air, light intensifying moment by moment, first birds swooping low over water, camera rising slowly above mist layer
rio-12-cachoeira-pequena: intimate waterfall cascading gently over stepped rocks, spray creating soft mist, ferns swaying in spray breeze, small rainbow appearing, camera slowly pushing in toward falls
rio-13-rio-noite: moonlight creating silver ribbon on dark flowing river, fireflies drifting slowly along riverbank as soft glowing dots, gentle current carrying reflected moonlight downstream, mysterious nocturnal movement
rio-14-pedras-rio: clear water flowing gently over smooth colorful stones, soft light patterns on riverbed moving with current, tiny bubbles streaming past, camera slowly moving downstream
rio-15-confluencia: two differently colored rivers meeting and slowly merging, swirling patterns forming at confluence, camera slowly circling above the meeting point, organic mixing of brown and turquoise waters
nomear-trailer-01-veu-suspenso: Static camera. Pale translucent silk veil suspended motionless. The veil breathes in almost imperceptibly, as if stirred by unseen air. Tiny dust particles drift very slowly through warm amber light. Dark depths behind.
nomear-trailer-02-veus-caindo: Static camera. Several thin silk veils descend slowly one after another through a column of warm golden light. Soft dust particles float gently upward as the veils fall. Deep navy background.
nomear-trailer-03-agua-ondula: Static macro. Single ripple expands slowly outward on a still dark water surface. Concentric rings widen and spread toward the edges of the frame. Warm reflection gently bends with each ring. Nothing else moves.
nomear-trailer-04-cozinha-antiga: Slow push-in toward an enamel cup and saucer on a weathered wooden table. Thin wisp of steam rises slowly from the cup. Soft morning light holds steady through a thin curtain.
nomear-trailer-05-veu-luminoso: Slow pull-out from a single luminous silk veil. The fabric rises and falls slowly as if breathing. Warm golden glow behind holds steady. Deep navy surroundings widen as the camera retreats.
nomear-trailer-06-mapa-territorio: Slow overhead drift-in toward an old paper map and brass compass on dark wood. One corner of the map curls upward almost imperceptibly. Compass needle steady. Soft side lamp light holds.
nomear-trailer-07-sete-velas: Slow cinematic dolly moving horizontally along a line of seven unlit beeswax candles on dark stone. Long soft shadows stretch gently as the camera travels. Candles unchanged.
nomear-trailer-08-caixa-fechada: Very slow push-in toward a closed dark wooden box on a worn shelf. Fine dust particles drift slowly in a soft beam of side light. Box perfectly still. Sealed atmosphere.
nomear-trailer-09-porta-luz: Slow push-in toward an ajar wooden doorway at the end of a dark corridor. Warm golden light holds steady through the opening. Fine dust particles drift softly in the beam across old wooden floorboards.
nomear-ep01-01-voz-antiga: Static camera holds on a dim empty room. Warm lamp glow steady in the far corner. Fine dust particles drift slowly through a narrow beam of light. Deep shadows unchanged.
nomear-ep01-02-sacos-porta: Slow dolly-in toward paper shopping bags standing alone on a wooden hallway floor. Long soft shadow of the half-open door stretches gently across the floorboards as the camera advances.
nomear-ep01-03-cozinha-vazia: Slow push-in toward a lone ceramic cup and a faded cloth on an old wooden table. Thin wisp of steam rises slowly from the cup. Faded cloth perfectly still.
nomear-ep01-04-anel-heranca: Macro shot slowly orbiting right around a single gold ring resting on folded dark velvet. Ring perfectly still. Warm side light holds steady. Fine dust drifts in the beam.
nomear-ep01-05-montra-loja: Static camera outside a shop window at night. Rain droplets trace slow wet lines down the glass. Warm interior light steady. Reflections of streetlamps sit on wet cobblestones below.
nomear-ep01-06-mesa-jantar: Slow pull-out from a single empty plate under a low hanging lamp. As the camera retreats, more of the long empty table is revealed. Dust particles drift slowly in the lamp's beam.
nomear-ep01-07-moedas-mesa: Slow drift to the right across a dark cafe table. Worn coins and a crumpled receipt pass through frame. Empty coffee cup holds still. Warm overhead light steady.
nomear-ep01-08-tecido-vento: Static camera. Long pale linen curtain stirs gently in a soft breeze by an open window at dusk. Curtain lifts slowly and settles, lifts and settles. Golden light passes through the weave.
nomear-ep01-09-balanca-antiga: Slow push-in toward an old brass balance scale on a dark shelf. The uneven pans drift ever so slightly, seeking balance. Long soft shadow on the aged wall behind. Warm side light steady.
nomear-ep01-10-raizes-chao: Slow crane rising upward over old tree roots emerging from dark forest soil at dawn. Cool morning mist drifts low through the scene. Warm first light spreads gently across the earth.
nomear-ep01-11-fresta-luz: Slow push-in toward a narrow doorway slightly ajar at the end of a dark corridor. Warm golden light holds steady through the opening. Fine dust particles drift softly in the beam across the wooden floor.
nomear-ep02-01-noite-quarto: Static camera. Dim bedroom at night, only a small bedside lamp lit. Fine dust particles drift slowly through the faint glow. Linen sheets unchanged. Deep shadows unchanged.
nomear-ep02-02-ecra-glow: Very slow push-in toward a smartphone face up on a dark bedside table. Cold pale screen glow steady. Wood grain around the phone visible in the light. Nothing else moves.
nomear-ep02-03-extracto-papel: Slow push-in toward a folded paper bank statement on an old wooden desk. Paper unchanged. Warm lamp light steady from the side. One corner of the paper lifts almost imperceptibly.
nomear-ep02-04-veredicto-martelo: Slow overhead tilt-down revealing a wooden gavel resting on a worn bench in an empty courtroom. Fine dust particles drift slowly through a warm window beam. Gavel perfectly still.
nomear-ep02-05-reflexo-vidro: Static camera on a rain-streaked window at night. Rain droplets trace slow wet lines down the glass. Dim reflection of an interior lamp holds steady in the wet surface.
nomear-ep02-06-relogio-noite: Static camera on an old pendulum wall clock in a dim hallway. Pendulum swings slowly with steady rhythm, left right left. Warm sconce light unchanged on the aged wall.
nomear-ep02-07-suspiro-cortina: Static camera. Pale curtain stirs gently over a slightly open window. Curtain rises with a soft inhale and settles with an exhale. Moonlight passes through the fabric.
nomear-ep02-08-laptop-uma-manha: Slow push-in toward an open laptop on a dark wooden desk at 1am. Screen glow steady. Scattered papers still. Cold coffee mug beside. Faint dust drifts through the screen light.
nomear-ep02-09-chavena-reuniao: Slow drift to the left across a dark cafe table. An empty espresso cup and crumpled paper notes pass through frame. Warm overhead light steady. Nothing on the table moves.
